text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmm, where else can I improve?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, greetings. May I have some of your time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I've been puzzling over how to
improve my times, but I have been unable to
come up with any ideas.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you were to offer your own racer advice, what
would you say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Stamina and guts, you say? I feel as though I have been focusing on them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose you are quite right. No amount of
training can ever be enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for your advice. I shall start
training at once!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My start, you say? You may have a point. I don't
think I have put much focus on it before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But if I mean to reach greater heights, it may be
necessary to anticipate how races will pan out
from the very start.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for your advice. I shall
incorporate this into my training at once!
